goal: Fix critical and high-priority bugs in packages/memory-injector/
context: The memory-injector package has 13 documented bugs in BUGS_FOUND.md with 31 tests. Tests already exist and expose the bugs - need to fix the implementation to make tests pass. Key issues: null/undefined content crashes (BUG #1), empty content not filtered (BUG #10), token estimation wrong for non-ASCII (BUG #5), first item too large causes data loss (BUG #6), no deduplication (BUG #13), silent error swallowing (BUG #7), empty query validation (BUG #2).

workItems.objective: Fix CRITICAL bugs #1 and #10: Handle null/undefined/empty content in packages/memory-injector/src/injector.ts
workItems.delta: Filter out null, undefined, and empty/whitespace-only content from preferences and decisions before processing. Add guards in the map transformation and filter empty items before building output.

workItems.objective: Fix HIGH bug #5: Improve token estimation for non-ASCII characters in packages/memory-injector/src/injector.ts
workItems.delta: Replace naive Math.ceil(length / 4) with better estimation that accounts for CJK characters (1-2 tokens per char), emoji (1-2 tokens each), and code (special chars split). Consider using a more sophisticated estimation or adding a safety buffer.

workItems.objective: Fix HIGH bug #6: Handle items that exceed maxTokens without losing all subsequent items in packages/memory-injector/src/injector.ts
workItems.delta: Change the loop logic to continue iterating instead of breaking when an item is too large. Skip items that individually exceed maxTokens but continue checking smaller items that would fit.

workItems.objective: Fix HIGH bug #13: Add deduplication to prevent same content appearing in both preferences and decisions in packages/memory-injector/src/injector.ts
workItems.delta: Add deduplication logic after combining and sorting items. Use a Set to track seen content and skip duplicates.

workItems.objective: Fix MEDIUM bugs #2 and #7: Add query validation and error logging in packages/memory-injector/src/injector.ts
workItems.delta: 1) Add early return null if query is empty or whitespace-only. 2) Replace silent error swallowing (.catch(() => ...)) with proper error logging before returning empty fallbacks.
